parkGraphUpserts.title: Park JSON upsert
parkGraphUpserts.subtitle: Paste a full or partial park JSON, preview the changes, then apply them without overwriting absent fields.

target.title: Target park
target.description: For updates, always select the existing park so the real technical id is used.
target.searchPlaceholder: Search a park by name, city or country…

options.createIfMissing: Allow creation when no park is selected
options.replaceCollections: Replace mode for missing collections (reserved for controlled imports)

editor.title: JSON document
editor.description: Absent properties are preserved. Zones/items arrays upsert only the elements they contain.

mode.title: Upsert mode
mode.description: Choose how the graph should treat existing collections before preview.

merge.title: Merge
merge.description: Keep absent collections untouched and upsert only entities present in the graph.

replaceCollections.title: Replace collections
replaceCollections.description: Allow controlled replacement behavior for collections managed by this graph.

graph.title: Graph overview
graph.description: Review the graph structure before preview.
graph.invalidJson: The JSON document is invalid. Open Expert JSON to fix it.

errors.noParkSelected: Select an existing park or enable explicit creation.

result.title: Preview
result.pending: Run a preview to inspect changes before applying.
